briefdescription.para: Destructor ensures rollback if not committed.
Add a key-value pair to the transaction.

simplesect.para: outcome::success or failure if already committed

briefdescription.para: Delete a key in the transaction.

simplesect.para: outcome::success or failure if already committed

briefdescription.para: Get a value for a key.

simplesect.para: Buffer containing the value if found, or error if not found/committed
This method checks pending operations first, then falls back to datastore

briefdescription.para: Erase a key from the transaction (alias for Remove).

simplesect.para: outcome::success or failure if already committed

briefdescription.para: Check if a key has been modified in this transaction.

simplesect.para: true if key has pending operations in this transaction

briefdescription.para: Commits all pending operations atomically. Combines all pending operations into a single Delta and publishes it.

parameterdescription.para: Optional topic name for targeted publishing. If not provided, the default broadcast behavior is used.

simplesect.para: outcome::success on successful commit, or outcome::failure if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: Find the most recent operation for a given key.

simplesect.para: optional containing the operation if found

briefdescription.para: AtomicTransaction provides atomic multi-key operations for CRDT datastore All operations within a transaction are combined into a single delta and published atomically to ensure consistency.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
